compiled_state.title: Implement REBASE_HEAD incoming-only file filtering in pre-commit-test-gate.sh
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart
compiled_state.description:
## Description

Add REBASE_HEAD detection and incoming-only file filtering to plugins/dso/hooks/pre-commit-test-gate.sh, mirroring the existing MERGE_HEAD block (lines 133-176):

1. After the MERGE_HEAD block (~line 176), add a new block: detect $(git rev-parse --git-dir)/REBASE_HEAD
2. Read the onto ref from $(git rev-parse --git-dir)/rebase-merge/onto or $(git rev-parse --git-dir)/rebase-apply/onto
3. Read orig-head from rebase state directory (rebase-merge/orig-head or rebase-apply/orig-head), NOT from ORIG_HEAD ref (overwritten by subsequent operations)
4. Compute merge base between orig-head and onto
5. Get files changed on the worktree branch: merge-base..orig-head
6. Filter STAGED_FILES: keep only files that the worktree branch touched
7. Fail-open: if onto file missing, orig-head unreadable, or merge-base fails -> fall through to normal enforcement with full staged file list
8. Add REBASE_HEAD guard to prune_test_index() function (mirroring MERGE_HEAD guard at line 253): skip pruning when REBASE_HEAD is present
9. Use git rev-parse --git-dir (not hardcoded .git/) for per-worktree path resolution in linked worktrees

The implementation makes the 4 RED tests from the preceding task turn GREEN.

Done Definition 4 (squash-rebase recovery path in merge-to-main.sh) is covered by the bash unit tests which simulate the exact same git state that merge-to-main.sh's squash-rebase recovery produces — REBASE_HEAD present with incoming-only files staged. No separate integration test is needed because the hook behavior is purely a function of git state files, which the tests faithfully reproduce.

## TDD Requirement

The 4 RED tests from task 0ec5-1cb7 will turn GREEN:
- test_gate_rebase_filters_incoming_only_files -> exits 0
- test_gate_rebase_keeps_worktree_branch_files -> exits non-zero
- test_gate_rebase_failsafe_on_missing_onto -> exits non-zero
- test_gate_rebase_prune_skipped_during_rebase -> prune skipped

## File Impact

- plugins/dso/hooks/pre-commit-test-gate.sh (modify — add REBASE_HEAD block + prune guard)
- .test-index (modify — remove RED marker after tests pass)

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0) — all tests including new REBASE_HEAD tests
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py passes (exit 0)
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py 2>/dev/null || true
- [ ] REBASE_HEAD detection block exists in pre-commit-test-gate.sh
  Verify: grep -q 'REBASE_HEAD' plugins/dso/hooks/pre-commit-test-gate.sh
- [ ] Reads onto from rebase-merge/onto or rebase-apply/onto
  Verify: grep -q 'rebase-merge/onto\|rebase-apply/onto' plugins/dso/hooks/pre-commit-test-gate.sh
- [ ] Uses git rev-parse --git-dir for path resolution (at least 2 occurrences in new block)
  Verify: grep -c 'git rev-parse --git-dir' plugins/dso/hooks/pre-commit-test-gate.sh | awk '{exit ($1 < 2)}'
- [ ] Fail-open fallback when onto file missing (test passes)
  Verify: bash -c 'cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && bash tests/hooks/test-pre-commit-test-gate.sh 2>&1 | grep -q "test_gate_rebase_failsafe_on_missing_onto.*PASS"'
- [ ] prune_test_index skipped during rebase (grep broader context)
  Verify: grep -A10 'prune_test_index' plugins/dso/hooks/pre-commit-test-gate.sh | grep -q 'REBASE_HEAD'
- [ ] .test-index RED marker removed after implementation passes
  Verify: ! grep -q 'pre-commit-test-gate.*\[test_gate_rebase' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 4/6: Implementation complete ✓ — all 4 rebase tests GREEN
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 6/6: Done ✓ — all ACs verified: REBASE_HEAD block present, rebase-merge/onto reads implemented, git rev-parse --git-dir used (5 occurrences), prune_test_index has REBASE_HEAD guard, .test-index RED marker removed, 4 tests GREEN
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: Fixed: REBASE_HEAD filtering implemented in pre-commit-test-gate.sh. All 4 RED tests now GREEN. Committed as d0f3ba06.
